{{Infobox character
| name = Voice of Solstice
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
| name = Voice of Solstice
| aliases = The Voice
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = representative of the highest leadership in Solstice, representative of Solstice
| affiliations = Solstice
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

''See also: [[Voice of Solstice Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Voice of [[Solstice]], also known as The Voice, serves as a high-level representative for the organization known as [[Solstice]], which is composed of [[World Spirits]]. This entity communicates using an androgynous, modulated voice that can be heard through speakers, though it is unclear if the individual holding this title remains constant or changes per meeting. Visually, the Voice typically appears as a humanoid shadow or dark silhouette, often described as being outlined by golden or reddish light similar to an eclipsed moon. During interactions, the entity has demonstrated an extensive level of knowledge and has been seen utilizing a pale staff topped with a hand holding a ring of fire, which may be retrieved from a subspace pocket. The Voice acts as a negotiator and authority figure, coordinating with groups like the crew of [[The Last Horizon]] and [[President Vallenar]] to further the organization's cause, while also asserting control over operations and claiming that their magic is superior to others.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Serving as a representative for the highest leadership in [[Solstice]], the Voice of [[Solstice]] is a summoned beast rather than a person. This entity appears as a humanoid shadow or dark silhouette, often appearing like an eclipsed moon outlined by golden light. While possessing an androgynous voice, the creature's blank face can split open into a smile to release reddish light. During a ritual, the twelve-foot-tall being takes the first position while wielding a staff topped by a grasping hand that holds a burning ring of fire. In this form, the creature wears a mask and features an orb of darkness for a head outlined in reddish-orange flame.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a representative of the highest leadership in [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a faceless silhouette used to communicate for [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a humanoid shadow lit from behind like an eclipsed moon.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Voice claims their magic is superior to Captain Vallenar's.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] appears as a dark human silhouette outlined by golden light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] has an androgynous voice.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Voice has a blank face that can split open into a smile and release reddish light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] takes the first position in the ritual.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] uses a staff that may be wood or bone, topped by a grasping hand holding a burning ring of fire.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] uses a staff.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a representative of [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] wears a mask.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a tall, faceless creature with an orb of darkness for a head outlined in reddish-orange flame.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is approximately twelve feet tall.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Voice of Solstice]] is a summoned beast rather than a person.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I am a representative of the highest leadership in our organization. You can consider me the Voice of Solstice.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|I gave up. “What choice do we have? We accept.” ... I tried to read into that. Did this Voice know that Omega was inside Shadow Ark or not? Regrettably, it was difficult to interpret expressions on a faceless silhouette.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"And we don’t need him for this. Our magic is superior even to his."<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“I will take the first position,” the Voice of Solstice said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The Zenith Processor is our ally,” the Voice went on, “but he is not one of us.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Solstice]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
